productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Beige Shoes
description: Style NoteU.S. Polo Association has elevated the humble sneaker by dressing it up with nubuck and colourful overlays. Sleek silhouetting adds to this pair's visual appeal. Delectable colouring and genius styling make this shoe top our wish-list this season!Product Detailsrunning shoe in beige and blue with lace-up fasteningSynthetic upper with stitched detailing and suede overlaysPadded, mesh collar and tongue and padded innner and footbedUpper stitched to the outsolePU outsole with herringbone grooves along the length of the outsole on one side and brick style grooves on the otherMaterial and CareSuede and syntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
